emails.subject: April deal
emails.body: April deal Got a call from El Paso asking to begin deal on 4/4???? let me know what you want to do and El Paso's contract that will be picking up gas.... Thanks Lynda

emails.subject: RE: April deal
emails.body: RE: April deal I'll check on it.

emails.subject: RE: April deal
emails.body: RE: April deal They are starting on the 4th. I thought I told him the 3rd but I may have made a mistake. My fault. Thanks

emails.subject: RE: April deal
emails.body: Beginning Wednesday, April 4th, El Paso will be taking 3,373 Dth per day from DRN #716, contract #101067. El Paso will scheduling the gas on contract #5207. Thanks everyone. Chris L. Germany Manager, Gas Trading Phone 713-853-4743 Fax 713-646-3059
